---
title: "Analytics & Big Data"
subtitle: "Integration and exam preparation"
section_label: "Synthesis"
session: "Session 11"
date: "2026-05-11"
---

## {data-menu-title="Learning objectives" data-state="hide-menubar"}

<br><br><br><br><br>

::: {.learning-objectives}
- **Summarize** how learnings integrate across the semester.
- **Resolve** remaining questions for exam preparation.
:::

# TODO {data-stack-name="TODO"}


## Survey: Session 11 {data-state="hide-menubar"}

<br><br>

::: {style="display:flex; justify-content:center;"}

{{< qrcode https://forms.gle/K4wGvwchWkBsQdhc9 width=400 height=400 >}}

:::

<br><br>

[https://forms.gle/K4wGvwchWkBsQdhc9](https://forms.gle/K4wGvwchWkBsQdhc9)

::: aside
Note: Responses may be analyzed and published in anonymized form.
:::

# References {data-state="hide-menubar"}
